title: ICSI Career Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
short_info: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) Recruitment 2026: Institute of Company Secretaries of India has released the official notification for Career Consultants posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Meghalaya. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation may be relaxed in deserving cases based on experience and suitability, at the discretion of the competent authority.

qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized institution Strong communication skills Ability to communicate in English and/or the regional language of the assigned State/district Basic familiarity with IT tools Experience in student mobilisation, academic counselling, or related activities shall be an added advantage

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 5,000/- per month honorarium plus performance-based incentives.
salary_details.details: Monthly Honorarium: Rs. 5,000/- (Timely submission of the Fortnightly Performance Report (FPR) and Certification of satisfactory performance by the Directorate of Student Services) Performance-Based Incentives: Rs. 750 per registration for CS Executive Programme, Rs. 250 per registration for CSEET (Incentives shall be released only for registrations duly reflected and verified in the Institute's system.)

selection_process: Shortlisting of candidates Written test/Interview (at the discretion of ICSI)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSI Career Consultants recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the ICSI Career Consultants recruitment is 04 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Career Consultants post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Career Consultants post is 21 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible for the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Career Consultants position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Career Consultants position is 35 years. However, age relaxation might be provided in deserving cases based on experience and suitability.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Career Consultants role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any discipline from a recognized institution to be eligible for the Career Consultants role. Strong communication skills are also essential.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Career Consultants position?
faq.answer: The Career Consultants will receive a monthly honorarium of Rs. 5,000/- along with performance-based incentives. The incentives are provided for student registrations in specific programs.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Career Consultants post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Career Consultants post involves shortlisting of candidates followed by a written test or interview, at the discretion of ICSI.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ICSI Career Consultants recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the ICSI Career Consultants recruitment. Candidates can proceed with their application without any fee payment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to fill out the electronic application form through the provided hyperlink on the official website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Career Consultants position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Career Consultants position is on a contract basis. This means the engagement will be for a specific period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Meghalaya, specifically in the West Garo Hills district. Candidates applying should be willing to work in this region.
